headline: American Express and Main Street America Award More Than $10 Million in Grants to Over 500 Small Businesses
summary: NEW YORK, May 20, 2026--American Express and Main Street America today announced the recipients of the Amex Shop Small® Grants Program, awarding over $10 million in funding to over 500 small businesses across the country. Each recipient has received a $20,000 grant to help them grow, innovate, and support their local communities.

headline: American Express and Fanatics Announce Exclusive Fan Experiences and New Fanatics American Express® Card
summary: NEW YORK, May 20, 2026--American Express (NYSE: AXP) and global sports platform Fanatics today announced a strategic multifaceted partnership where American Express becomes the Official Payments Partner across select Fanatics online and retail locations worldwide and a presenting sponsor at Fanatics Fest, one of the world’s premier sports fan festivals held annually in New York City. headline: Is American Express (AXP) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether American Express at around US$309 per share still offers value or if most of the upside is already priced in, this article walks you through what the current market price might be implying. The stock is down about 1.6% over the past week and 6.7% over the past month, even though the 1 year return is 5.5% and the 3 year and 5 year returns are around 110.1% and 108.0% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on how American Express sits within the Consumer Finance...

headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Delivered a 39,000x Return Since 1965. He Still Tells Most Investors to Buy Index Funds Instead.
summary: Although Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-B) has compiled the single best long-run track record in modern markets, the man who built it spends most of his shareholder letters telling you not to try this at home. On Wall Street, that contradiction has hardened into one of investing’s most durable patterns. From 1965 to 2025, Berkshire posted a ...
